items.title: 3 Fantastic Dividend Stocks to Buy Sooner Rather Than Later
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: The article discusses three dividend stocks - AbbVie, Johnson & Johnson, and Pfizer - that the authors believe are great picks for investors right now. The key points are that these companies offer attractive dividend yields, strong financial positions, and promising growth prospects.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights AbbVie's attractive forward dividend yield of 3.6%, its long history of dividend increases, and its reasonable valuation, making it appealing to income, value, and growth investors.

The article notes that despite facing some challenges, Johnson & Johnson's long history, strong business, and culture of innovation make it a top dividend pick for long-term investors, with a forward yield of 3.21%.

While Pfizer's high dividend yield of 6.6% may raise concerns, the article argues that the company's solid financial position and pipeline growth can offset the impact of falling COVID-19 sales, making it a good buy for investors before the yield declines.
